subcodes.first_line: O Sakinih! Time and again hath thy mention been revealed, and thou hast attained unto the tokens of God. The handmaidens of the earth have been kept back from the Truth by vain imaginings and idle fancies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سکینه مکرر ذکرت نازل و باثار الله فائز اماء ارض را ظنون و اوهام از حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
